title: Michael Shahinian
content:
People.ContactEmail mshahinian@mccarthy.ca
- University of Calgary
Michael Shahinian is a partner in the Business Law Group in Toronto, where he specializes in mergers and acquisitions, corporate law, and securities law.
With extensive experience across a broad range of complex transactions, Michael advises clients on mergers and acquisitions, public and private offerings, co-investments, secondary transactions, corporate structuring, governance, and reorganization.

#### Representative Transactions:
- National Bank of Canada on the acquisition of Canadian Western Bank
- TD Asset Management on the acquisition of Alberta PowerLine and its interest in PSA Italy
- Teranet on the sale of its Collateral Management Solutions business to Trader Corporation
- Banneker Partners on the acquisition of Versaterm, several follow-on acquisitions and the closing of a continuation fund
- The RES Group on the sale of several wind and solar projects
- Brookfield Renewable Holdings on the acquisition of Neoen
- General Mills on the sale of its North American yogurt business to Sodiaal
- Air Control Concepts on its expansion to Canada
- SCF Partners on the acquisition of the Pipeline and Industrial Materials business from Entegris
- Score Media and Gaming on its sale to Penn National Gaming
- Endeavour Mining on the acquisition of Teranga Gold Corporation
- Enbridge on its merger with Spectra Energy
- Enbridge on its acquisition of all public common shares of Enbridge Income Fund
Michael’s practical and commercial insights are enhanced by his secondment at a major Canadian pension fund, where he supported the investment and asset management teams. He has also been a guest lecturer at Osgoode Hall Law School (J.D. and L.L.M. programs), speaking on corporate and securities law.
Michael holds a Bachelor of Arts from the University of Western Ontario and a Juris Doctor from the University of Calgary. He was called to the Alberta Bar in 2017 and the Ontario Bar in 2019, and is a member of the Law Society of Ontario, the Law Society of Alberta, and the Canadian Bar Association.
- Best Lawyers in Canada Ones to Watch: Mergers and Acquisitions Law

### Best Lawyers in Canada
Ones to Watch: Mergers and Acquisitions Law
- National Bank of Canada acquires Canadian Western Bank for approximately C$5B February 3, 2025
- General Mills sells North American yogurt business to Lactalis and Sodiaal for US$2.1B January 27, 2025
- Banneker Partners Closes Continuation Fund January 13, 2025
- Brookfield Renewable Holdings completes acquisition of 53.12% stake in Neoen for EUR 3.25B December 30, 2024
- Teranet Inc. sells Collateral Management Solutions to Trader Corporation June 20, 2024
- TD Asset Management and Fair Market Value Capital Partners jointly acquire 28% interest in PSA Italy March 18, 2024
- Publication Technology Perspectives Outlook 2026 March 30, 2026
- Publication On Target: 2026 Private Equity Outlook 10th Edition January 5, 2026
